mapper.select: SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.BATH_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO, A.FLOOR_TOTAL , A.ADDRESS , A.THUMB_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.BATH_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO, A.FLOOR_TOTAL , A.ADDRESS , A.THUMB_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC, A.CRE_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.BATH_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO, A.FLOOR_TOTAL , A.ADDRESS , A.THUMB_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM , A.CAT_CD , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.BATH_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO, A.FLOOR_TOTAL , A.ADDRESS , A.THUMB_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT A.* , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD) AS CAT_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.MID_CAT_CD) AS MID_CAT_NM , (SELECT C.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY C WHERE C.CAT_CD = A.SUB_CAT_CD) AS SUB_CAT_NM , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '단기임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.THUMB_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_PATH , A.AREA_LAND , A.AREA_TOTAL , A.ZONE_TYPE , A.ROAD_WIDTH , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CRE_DTM_FMT FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{id} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT F.UPLD_FILE_CD , F.FILE_SEQ , CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, F.SAVE_FILE_NM) AS IMG_PATH FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F INNER JOIN TB_PROPERTY A ON A.ATCH_FILE_KEY COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = F.UPLD_FILE_CD WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{id} AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CASE WHEN CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, F.SAVE_FILE_NM) = A.THUMB_IMG_PATH THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, F.FILE_SEQ ASC
SELECT CAT_CD , CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE CAT_LVL = 0 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
SELECT CAT_CD AS MID_CAT_CD , CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE UPR_CAT_CD = #{catCd} AND CAT_LVL = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
SELECT CAT_CD AS SUB_CAT_CD , CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE UPR_CAT_CD = #{midCatCd} AND CAT_LVL = 2 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
